MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Mercedes Gavin, Esq. for plaintiff The John Stewart Company.
Steven Gong, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Illya Sean Turner, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case does not settle. Trial date to remain set.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST DEFENDANT.
APPEARANCES: Mercedes A. Gavin, Esq. of Law Offices of Mercedes Gavin 497-1493 for pltf & moving party; Illya Sean Turner, 510/778-4241 deft & opposing party in propria persona.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion for Summary Judgment is Denied. Triable issue of fact regarding existence of nuisance. (Defendant's declaration.) (302/CWW/PB) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5759
